rationale: Enabling -Werror for clang on CI; build/CI configuration, no spec behavior involved.
Compiler error: implicit declaration of strcasecmp; build/platform issue, no spec involved.
Coverity static analysis defect: side effect in assertion in gridfs file; no spec rule violated.
Fedora/RHEL installation documentation update; docs-only change, no spec behavior.
Darwin Secure Transport build warning breaking -Werror; build issue, no spec involved.
libbson parses $numberLong at top level differently depending on presence of other keys; inconsistent with BSON extended JSON spec.
Collation option missing from API documentation for _with_opts helpers; docs-only improvement.
Compiler format-string warning on mingw-w64; build/platform issue, no spec involved.
Assertion failure/crash in libmongoc after failed getMore; implementation crash, no specific spec rule violated.
Debian package dependency on libbson-dev missing; packaging issue, no spec behavior.
Driver uses legacy OP_GET_MORE on modern servers instead of the getMore command; wire protocol spec requires getMore command.
Build failure on Alpine Linux with LibreSSL; platform/build issue, no spec behavior.
Programmatic setter mongoc_uri_set_option_as_utf8() doesn't work for authMechanism; internal API implementation issue.
Invalid JSON with stray '}' accepted by parser; BSON extended JSON spec requires rejecting malformed JSON.
configure script fails to detect OpenSSL at custom path on macOS; build/configuration issue.
GCC version check doesn't account for GCC 5+; build system bug, no spec involved.
BSON array from JSON encoded with keys '1','3' instead of '0','1'; violates BSON spec array key ordering.
Odd exception message when auth fails with malformed domain socket URI; error message quality, no spec rule violated.
Memory leak in test framework under valgrind; test infrastructure internal issue, no spec behavior.
Segfault in mongoc_client_new with NUMA performance counters; internal crash, no spec rule violated.
Setting up clang-format code style configuration; code formatting, no spec behavior.
Declaring __cdecl calling convention on Windows; ABI/build issue, no spec behavior.
libbson already rejects $date without timezone correctly; improvement is better error message only.
Extended JSON parser doesn't understand $code type; BSON extended JSON spec defines $code as valid type.
Internal JSON library replacement (libyajl to jsonsl); refactor enabling bug fixes, not a spec nonconformance itself.
Build breaks when user CFLAGS contain double quotes; build system escaping bug.
dpkg-gensymbols error building Debian package; packaging issue, no spec behavior.
Sentences missing after hyperlinks in generated man pages; documentation generation bug.
PRI format specifiers conflict between bson-compat.h and inttypes.h on Visual Studio 2013; build/platform issue.
libbson skips inner length validation for binary subtype 0x02; BSON spec defines the inner length must be consistent.
datetime.json BSON corpus test case fails; extended JSON datetime parsing deviates from spec-defined test.
bson_as_json outputs double 1.0 as '1' not '1.0'; extended JSON spec (SPEC-587) requires doubles to preserve decimal.
Cyrus SASL header checks don't find non-system paths; build/configuration issue.
Conflicting macro definitions MAX/MIN on FreeBSD; build/platform symbol collision.
Missing symbol exports for mongoc_gridfs_file_set_*(); API/packaging issue, not a GridFS spec rule violation.
Wrong ifdef check for strerror_r variant on MinGW; platform/build issue, no spec behavior.
BSON_ALIGNED_BEGIN/END GCC attribute placement incorrect; build/ABI issue, no spec behavior.
Windows CA stores opened without read-only flag; TLS security hardening, no spec rule violated.
bson_init_from_json returns false on empty string without setting error; API inconsistency with docs, not a spec violation.
Driver incorrectly rejects valid queries mixing $ and non-$ operators; CRUD spec does not prohibit such queries.
Topology scanner times out on IPv6 address; implementation/networking bug, no specific SDAM spec rule violated.
Driver aborts with precondition failure when empty BSON command sent; crash/robustness bug, no spec rule violated.
Undefined RTL_RUN_ONCE and suseconds_t on mingw64; build/platform compatibility issue.
APM assigns duplicate operation_ids across unrelated commands and different ids within one bulk operation; violates command monitoring spec.
Improvement to add BSON key validation before insert/update; driver not previously required to do this, no existing spec rule violated.
Socket sendv test assertion failure on FreeBSD 10.3; platform-specific test failure, no spec behavior.
Migrating documentation from Mallard XML to RST; docs tooling change, no spec behavior.
Unfinished release archive logic in Evergreen config.yml; CI/build pipeline issue.
MinGW build and test setup in Evergreen CI; CI/build configuration, no spec behavior.
Build fails on MinGW 6.2.0 with undefined reference to realpath; build/platform issue.
